translation.en: You need to pay attention when driving.

notes_md:
**để ý** = to pay attention to something, to notice something. It’s about focusing your mind or becoming aware of a detail.

It’s usually followed by a person or thing you’re paying attention to.  

It can also mean **to take notice of** small changes or problems, often subtly. In casual contexts, **để ý ai** can mean “to have a crush on someone” (romantic interest).

Close synonym: **chú ý** (more formal, often used in announcements).
notes:
để ý = to pay attention to something, to notice something. It’s about focusing your mind or becoming aware of a detail.

It’s usually followed by a person or thing you’re paying attention to.  

It can also mean to take notice of small changes or problems, often subtly. In casual contexts, để ý ai can mean “to have a crush on someone” (romantic interest).

Close synonym: chú ý (more formal, often used in announcements).
exampleSentences: Anh nhớ để ý khi đi qua đường đông xe nhé.
Chị phải để ý lời nói của mình khi nói trước đám đông.
Em nên để ý bài giảng của thầy nếu muốn hiểu bài tốt hơn.
exampleSentencesTranslated: Remember to pay attention when crossing a busy street.
You have to pay attention to your words when speaking in front of a crowd.
You should pay attention to the teacher's lecture if you want to understand better.

translation.en: You remember to pay attention to yesterday's lecture.

content.sentence: Bạn nhớ ___ bài giảng hôm qua.

example.en: You should pay attention to the small details.
example.vi: Bạn hãy để ý đến những chi tiết nhỏ.
example.es: Debes prestar atención a los pequeños detalles.

definitions.vi: Chú ý hoặc nhận ra điều gì đó.
definitions.en: To pay attention or to notice something.
